evals.prompt: Scan a partially structured repository and decide whether keeper normalization is required before any new template generation.
evals.expected_output: Inventory and recommendation for keeper with rationale.

evals.prompt: Analyze a legacy repo where architecture notes are mixed in README and propose canonical migration paths.
evals.expected_output: Report that preserves information while recommending canonical split into AGENTS/BACKLOG/PLANS/etc.

evals.prompt: Inspect a clean architecture workspace and verify whether no structural refactor is needed.
evals.expected_output: Conservative report recommending no major refactor and listing minor improvements only.
